user_query: I want to know the compatibility between Oliver M and Chloe P. Get me the match percentage using the Love Calculator. Also, check if the word 'chimpo' is vulgar using the SHIMONETA API.

TaskList.description: Calculate the compatibility percentage between Oliver M and Chloe P using the Love Calculator.
Check if the word 'chimpo' is considered vulgar using the SHIMONETA API.
